ratio_source_quote: 1:2 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C. Stored in airtight container over silica gel at 4 °C until further analysis.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirmed amorphous mixture).
source_quote: Surprisingly, although the 1:2 sample has the highest Tg (40.2 °C), traces of crystalline cimetidine are detected at all three temperatures.
notes: 1:2 NAP:CIM crystallized to cimetidine despite highest Tg (40.2 ± 1.1 °C). XRPD peak at 23.5° (cimetidine) detected at all three storage temperatures (4/25/40 °C) by day 33. Exact induction time not reported — only known to be ≤33 days. Storage in desiccator over silica gel (≈0% RH).
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (silica-desikkaattori), 33 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; 33 d > dry_short_term-rajan (≤30 vrk); merkitty non_standard
Sensurointi: tarkkaa induktioaikaa ei raportoitu, vain havainto päivänä 33 (≤3d ylimittaus puuttuu); t=33 d on yläraja

ratio_source_quote: 1:2 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
source_quote: Surprisingly, although the 1:2 sample has the highest Tg (40.2 °C), traces of crystalline cimetidine are detected at all three temperatures.
notes: 1:2 NAP:CIM crystallized to cimetidine at 25 °C/0% RH; XRPD peak at 23.5° detected by day 33. Exact induction time ≤33 days. Storage in desiccator over silica gel.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (silica), 33 d ei sovi mihinkään standardiluokkaan; merkitty non_standard
Sensurointi: tarkkaa induktioaikaa ei raportoitu, vain havainto päivänä 33; t=33 d on yläraja

ratio_source_quote: 1:2 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
source_quote: Surprisingly, although the 1:2 sample has the highest Tg (40.2 °C), traces of crystalline cimetidine are detected at all three temperatures.
notes: 1:2 NAP:CIM crystallized to cimetidine at 40 °C/0% RH; XRPD peak at 23.5° detected by day 33. Exact induction time ≤33 days. Note: 40 °C with 0% RH is non-standard (ICH accelerated requires 75% RH).
review_reasons: Protokolla 40 °C / 0% RH (silica), 33 d — ei vastaa ICH-accelerated-protokollaa (joka edellyttää 75% RH); merkitty non_standard
Sensurointi: tarkkaa induktioaikaa ei raportoitu, vain havainto päivänä 33; t=33 d on yläraja

ratio_source_quote: 1:1 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
detection_methods: XRPD (halo at all storage points); DSC (single Tg = 34.5 ± 0.3 °C); FT-Raman (1:1 sample only — confirmed solid-state interaction between cimetidine imidazole ring and naproxen carboxylic acid via shifts at 1604 cm⁻¹ and 1634 cm⁻¹).
source_table_or_figure: Table 1; Fig. 3; Fig. 5; Section 3.2 (long-term in Supporting Information)
source_quote: the 1:1 amorphous mixture is the most physically stable sample after 33 days storage at all three temperatures, as a halo pattern could still be observed... the 1:1 co-milled sample remained amorphous after 186 days of storage (approximately 6 months) at all three storage temperatures.
notes: Most stable mixture in the study. Right-censored at 186 days. Tg (34.5 °C) lower than 1:2 sample's Tg (40.2 °C), yet 1:1 is more stable — attributed to 1:1 molecular ion-pair interaction between cimetidine imidazole ring and naproxen carboxylic acid (Raman: shift 1601→1604 cm⁻¹). Gordon–Taylor predicted Tg=10.7 °C; experimental 34.5 °C deviation supports molecular interaction. Storage in silica gel desiccator.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (silica), 186 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

ratio_source_quote: 1:1 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
detection_methods: XRPD (halo at all storage points); DSC; FT-Raman (1:1 sample only).
source_table_or_figure: Table 1; Fig. 3; Fig. 5; Section 3.2 (long-term in Supporting Information)
source_quote: the 1:1 amorphous mixture is the most physically stable sample after 33 days storage at all three temperatures, as a halo pattern could still be observed... the 1:1 co-milled sample remained amorphous after 186 days of storage (approximately 6 months) at all three storage temperatures.
notes: Right-censored at 186 days at 25 °C/0% RH. Storage in silica gel desiccator. Stability attributed to 1:1 NAP-CIM molecular ion-pair interaction.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (silica), 186 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

ratio_source_quote: 1:1 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
detection_methods: XRPD (halo at all storage points); DSC; FT-Raman (1:1 sample only).
source_table_or_figure: Table 1; Fig. 3; Fig. 5; Section 3.2 (long-term in Supporting Information)
source_quote: the 1:1 amorphous mixture is the most physically stable sample after 33 days storage at all three temperatures... the 1:1 co-milled sample remained amorphous after 186 days of storage (approximately 6 months) at all three storage temperatures.
notes: Right-censored at 186 days at 40 °C/0% RH. Note: 40 °C with 0% RH is non-standard (ICH accelerated requires 75% RH). 1:1 sample stable at all three storage temperatures — driven by molecular interaction not bulk Tg.
review_reasons: Protokolla 40 °C / 0% RH (silica), 186 d — ei vastaa ICH-accelerated-protokollaa (joka edellyttää 75% RH); merkitty non_standard

ratio_source_quote: 2:1 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
source_quote: The 2:1 sample, in contrast, is stable at 4 °C, while traces of crystalline naproxen, the excess component, are found at 25 °C.
notes: 2:1 NAP:CIM stable (amorphous) at 4 °C through day 33. Right-censored at 33 days; not extended to longer storage. Storage in silica gel desiccator.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (silica), 33 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; 33 d > dry_short_term-rajan (≤30 vrk); merkitty non_standard

ratio_source_quote: 2:1 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
detection_methods: XRPD (naproxen peak at 19.1° detected at day 33); DSC.
source_quote: The 2:1 sample, in contrast, is stable at 4 °C, while traces of crystalline naproxen, the excess component, are found at 25 °C.
notes: 2:1 NAP:CIM crystallized to naproxen (excess component) at 25 °C/0% RH; XRPD peak at 19.1° detected by day 33. Exact induction time ≤33 days. Storage in silica gel desiccator.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (silica), 33 d — ei sovi mihinkään standardiluokkaan; merkitty non_standard
Sensurointi: tarkkaa induktioaikaa ei raportoitu, vain havainto päivänä 33; t=33 d on yläraja

ratio_source_quote: 2:1 molar ratio (naproxen:cimetidine); 'A total of 1 g of naproxen and cimetidine at 1:2, 1:1 and 2:1 molar ratios was used for milling.'
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
source_quote: At 40 °C crystallization of naproxen is more pronounced.
notes: 2:1 NAP:CIM crystallized to naproxen at 40 °C/0% RH; multiple XRPD peaks detected (more pronounced than at 25 °C). Storage 40 °C is the highest tested storage T (above Tg=31.5 °C). Exact induction time ≤33 days.
review_reasons: Protokolla 40 °C / 0% RH (silica), 33 d — ei vastaa ICH-accelerated-protokollaa (joka edellyttää 75% RH); merkitty non_standard
Sensurointi: tarkkaa induktioaikaa ei raportoitu, vain havainto päivänä 33; t=33 d on yläraja
Storage T (40 °C) > Tg (31.5 °C) — odotettavissa nopea kiteytyminen, mutta tarkkaa kineticaa ei raportoitu
